authDict.loginDesc: Sign in to unlock all pages
authDict.signupDesc: Enter your email to create a new account
authDict.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

cover.title: PRD Walkthrough
cover.subtitle: A product-led global market intelligence system: automated analysis, continuous scanning, response generation, and outcome-based billing.

docRefs.label: PRD
docRefs.hoverDesc: Complete business definitions covering background, methodology, scanners, replies, billing, portals, partner ecosystem, and the technical stack.

docRefs.label: Architecture
docRefs.desc: Three product layers and three portals
docRefs.hoverDesc: The full mapping from Project Subscription, Market Intelligence Report, and Reply Outreach to the Portal, User Dashboard, and Admin Dashboard.

docRefs.label: Billing
docRefs.hoverDesc: Includes Prepaid, PAYG, CPA, platform tier multipliers, and administrator adjustment permissions.

stages.label: Intake
stages.hoverDesc: The user enters product or service details in the dashboard. The system creates a project and moves it into analyzing status.

stages.label: Analyze
stages.desc: LLM infers pain points and queries
stages.hoverDesc: Ollama Gamma 4 infers target audience pain points, competitors, platforms, keywords, and multilingual queries.

stages.label: Scan
stages.hoverDesc: Covers Reddit, YouTube, Google, Amazon, Quora, Twitter/X, V2EX, Weibo, plus Japanese, Korean, Spanish, Portuguese, and Russian local platforms.

stages.label: Mine
stages.hoverDesc: Mentions are clustered by pain point, validated across sources, and scored into high-value reply opportunities.

stages.label: Reply
stages.desc: Generate useful content with tracked links
stages.hoverDesc: The system drafts natural, platform-aware replies, routes them into review, and publishes them to the right communities.

stages.label: Settle
stages.desc: Bill for valid clicks · allow manual adjustments
stages.hoverDesc: Link clicks are written to funnel_events. Prepaid deducts in real time, PAYG bills monthly, and admins can discount or waive charges.

metrics.label: Scanners
metrics.hoverDesc: 13 dedicated scanners cover Q&A, comments, negative reviews, search suggestions, V2EX, Weibo, and local-language communities.

metrics.label: Platform Skills
metrics.hoverDesc: 12 reusable skills provide the core capabilities for scanning, mining, and reply generation.

metrics.label: Target Languages
metrics.hoverDesc: English, Spanish, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, and Russian.

metrics.label: Platform Tiers
metrics.hoverDesc: Reply outreach is priced across four multiplier tiers based on platform operating cost.

stack.name: Next.js 15
stack.desc: App Router + SSR/SSG for the marketing portal, user dashboard, and admin dashboard front ends.

stack.name: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
stack.desc: A shared UI system that supports responsive layouts and dense data views across all three portals.

stack.name: Supabase Auth
stack.desc: Email + OAuth identity, combined with RLS to isolate customers, partners, and administrators.

stack.name: Supabase PostgreSQL 15
stack.desc: Stores core business tables, billing records, tracking events, and audit logs in one place.

stack.name: Cloudflare R2 + D1
stack.desc: R2 stores raw crawl output and report archives (zero egress); D1 serves as edge cache for hot queries.

stack.name: FastAPI
stack.desc: The external API and business orchestration layer that handles frontend requests and task triggers.

stack.name: Celery + Beat
stack.desc: Runs scheduled scans, asynchronous mining, report generation, and monthly billing jobs.

stack.name: Ollama Gamma 4
stack.desc: Executes local product analysis, reply generation, and low-cost text classification.

stack.name: Gemini 1.5 Flash / Pro
stack.desc: Used as the high-quality fallback for aggregation reasoning, report summarization, and reply polishing.

stack.name: Playwright + PRAW + Tweepy
stack.desc: Supports web scraping, Reddit, Twitter/X, and automated collection on platforms without usable APIs.

stack.name: Stripe + Stripe Connect
stack.desc: Primary channel for customer payments, PAYG billing, partner revenue sharing, and monthly settlements.

background.title: Project Background & Goals
background.subtitle: Instead of pushing ads at strangers, we enter the conversation with real value when users publicly express frustration and ask for help.

problem.title: Structural Problems in Traditional Acquisition
points: Search ads and feed ads mainly target people who have not yet entered an active buying cycle, driving CPC up while conversions stay low.
KOL campaigns create exposure but lack precise intent, and ROI fluctuates heavily with creators and platform changes.
Market research and outreach are usually separated, so customers research first and hunt for channels later, creating a long feedback loop.
Signals across multilingual markets are scattered across different communities, and local platforms are difficult to monitor continuously by hand.

solution.title: The MOTA Approach
points: Start from the customer's product description and reverse-engineer user pain points, competitors, and multi-platform search intent.
Continuously scan public communities for complaints, questions, negative reviews, comments, and real-time sentiment.
Use AI to generate natural replies that help first and guide second, with attributable tracking links embedded.
Bill on valid clicks and deeper conversions so cost is directly tied to measurable outcomes.

workflow.label: Enter Product
workflow.brief: Product name, description, URL, target languages
workflow.detail: The customer creates a project in the dashboard and fills in the product intro, landing page URL, target market languages, optional competitors, and reply tone.

workflow.label: Analyze Product
workflow.brief: Infer pain points, platforms, and queries
workflow.detail: The LLM outputs domain_tags, target_audience_pain, competitors, keywords, subreddits, and multilingual_queries.

workflow.label: Scan All Platforms
workflow.detail: Eleven scanner types run on queues and schedules to find complaints, requests for help, negative reviews, and unanswered questions across English and local-language platforms.

workflow.label: Deliver Three Layers of Value
workflow.detail: The system scans continuously, generates market research reports, and drafts tracked replies for highly relevant mentions.

workflow.label: Track and Bill
workflow.brief: Valid clicks, CPA, and manual adjustments
workflow.detail: Tracking events are written to funnel_events, Credits are deducted for Prepaid, PAYG is settled monthly, and admins can discount, waive, or grant credits.

goals.title: Product First
goals.desc: Customers should not need to write prompts or do upfront market research; the system starts directly from product information.
details: Automatically infer the target audience and core pain points.
Automatically generate platform queries and language variants.
Automatically enter the continuous scanning and reply pipeline.

goals.title: Three-Layer Monetization
goals.desc: Separate scanning cost, research value, and outreach outcomes into three independently sellable product layers.
details: Project Subscription covers long-term monitoring costs.
Market Intelligence Report acts as a lead-gen and research product.
Reply Outreach is billed on outcomes.

goals.title: Global Multilingual Coverage
goals.desc: The system should not stop at English markets; it should reach local communities and local platforms directly.
details: Supports EN / ES / PT / JA / KO / RU.
Balances mainstream English platforms with local channels.
Extends outreach from the public web into regional communities.

goals.title: Replies with Real Value
goals.desc: Solve the problem first, then introduce the product naturally to reduce ad fatigue and account-risk exposure.
details: Sensitive communities and high-value pain points require manual review.
Supports AI rewriting to match community tone.

goals.title: Auditable and Adjustable
goals.desc: Every click, charge, adjustment, and partner payout must be traceable.
details: funnel_events keeps both valid and invalid clicks.
Supports Prepaid, PAYG, and CPA in parallel.

methods.name: Negative Search Method
methods.detail: Capture users who already tried generic solutions and still failed by searching around frustration phrases such as “not working,” “frustrated,” or “broken.”

methods.name: Community Q&A Radar
methods.detail: Prioritize questions that remain under-answered, poorly answered, or still unresolved to find openings where the product can become the better answer.

methods.name: Video Comment Mining
methods.detail: Tutorial comment sections naturally accumulate real feedback like “this still doesn’t solve it” and “I have the same problem.”

methods.name: Negative Review Reverse Mapping
methods.platforms: Amazon · App Store · Google Play · Trustpilot · G2
methods.detail: Competitor negative reviews are ready-made blueprints for unmet demand and quickly reveal users who want a solution but still feel underserved.

methods.name: Real-Time Sentiment Monitoring
methods.detail: Scan real-time complaints and trending topics almost immediately to join the conversation during the short window when users are actively venting.

methods.name: Technical Q&A Capture
methods.detail: Target technical questions with high views, weak answers, or no accepted answer, making the method a strong fit for tools and developer products.

methods.name: Cross-Source Validation
methods.detail: When the same pain point appears repeatedly across different communities, both signal strength and commercial confidence rise sharply.

methods.name: Local-Language Platform Expansion
methods.platforms: Taringa! · Reclame Aqui · Yahoo! Chiebukuro · Naver · Pikabu
methods.detail: Extend reach from the English-language internet into Spanish, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, and Russian native communities.

products.title: Three-Layer Product System
products.subtitle: Break continuous scanning cost, research report value, and community outreach outcomes into three product lines that can each be sold independently.

subscription.title: Layer 1: Project Subscription
subscription.summary: Charged monthly per project to cover scanning, proxy usage, APIs, and baseline AI analysis. When a project is paused, subscription deductions stop.

report.title: Layer 2: Market Intelligence Report
report.summary: Research only, without outreach. It turns scattered market complaints and demand signals into a structured report, making it ideal as a lead-gen product and a pre-sales asset.

outreach.title: Layer 3: Reply Outreach
outreach.summary: Publishing replies is free. Charges occur only after a real user clicks the tracked link and passes anti-fraud checks, consuming Credits or posting to a PAYG invoice according to platform multipliers.

scanning.title: Scanner Matrix & Platform Skills
scanning.subtitle: Scanners are responsible for collection, while Skills encapsulate reusable platform capabilities. Together they cover comments, negative reviews, Q&A, search suggestions, and local communities.

engine.title: Product Analysis Engine
engine.subtitle: This is the automation core at the system entrance: understand the product, define who the target users are, where to find them, and what topics to use to reach them.

pipeline.title: Execution Pipeline & Data Flow
pipeline.subtitle: From product intake to billing events, this is not a collection of isolated features. It is a continuous data chain built around shared project_id, mention_id, and tracking_url values.

billing.title: Billing Model & Multiplier Rules
billing.subtitle: Each of the three product layers carries a different cost structure, while Reply Outreach adds finer-grained billing through Prepaid, PAYG, CPA, and platform multipliers.

architecture.title: Product Architecture & Portal Architecture
architecture.subtitle: The product layer answers “what we sell,” while the portal layer answers “who uses it and where actions happen.” Together they form a complete, operable system.

portals.title: Three-Portal Design
portals.subtitle: The same underlying data platform powers three very different work surfaces for three different user roles.

partners.title: Partner Ecosystem & AI Matching
partners.subtitle: When system-owned accounts cannot earn enough community trust, AI hands the opportunity to real community members, local operators, and creator partners to finish the last mile.

programs.name: Native Platform User Partner Program
programs.target: Regular community members with credible real-account history
programs.compensation: Bronze $0.02 / Silver $0.04 / Gold $0.08 per valid click
programs.flow: Apply → AI rating → task acceptance → publish through personal account → monthly settlement
programs.fit: Best for communities like Reddit, Quora, and HN where authentic identity matters

programs.name: Local Platform Operator Program
programs.target: Regional operators with local accounts, native language capability, and local IP resources
programs.compensation: Settled with dedicated Tier 4 multipliers and CPA bonuses per task
programs.flow: Platform qualification review → language/domain match → local-platform task dispatch → link validation → revenue settlement
programs.fit: Best for high-operations-cost platforms such as VK, Naver, Yahoo! Chiebukuro, and Reclame Aqui

programs.name: Creator Co-Creation Program
programs.compensation: Creator $0.06 / Elite $0.12 per valid click, with Stripe or crypto settlement
programs.flow: AI discovers creators → targeted invitation → creative brief → independent creation → compliance scan → publish and settle
programs.fit: Best for brand campaigns that need high trust and high creative freedom

matching.desc: Compare project.domain_tags against partner specialties and historical task categories.
Evaluate account age, Karma, follower count, compliance history, and publishing success rate.
Prioritize JA / KO / ES / PT / RU projects for matching operators who cover the corresponding language and local platforms.
Select the best person for helpful, expert, or casual tone based on the partner's historical posting style and community preferences.
Dynamically adjust dispatch order based on project budget, platform tier, Gold Mine signal level, and task urgency.

aiStages.label: Discover
aiStages.desc: Automatically identify potential partner and creator leads during everyday scanning and write them into candidate pools in partners / creator_leads.

aiStages.label: Invite
aiStages.desc: Generate personalized outreach messages based on historical posting style.

aiStages.label: Match
aiStages.desc: Score and assign tasks based on domain, platform, language, budget, and quality requirements.

aiStages.label: Brief
aiStages.desc: Provide AI drafts for partners and creative briefs for creators.

aiStages.label: Compliance
aiStages.desc: Automatically detect banned terms, competitor attacks, exaggerated claims, and link validity.

aiStages.label: Settle
aiStages.desc: Aggregate valid clicks automatically at month end and settle through Stripe Connect or on-chain transfers.
